name: Schnitzel and Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches arugula, trimmed, washed, dried, bite-sized pieces
1 head Belgian endive, cored, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together vinegar, 1 teaspoon mustard, salt, pepper, and olive oil in a large bowl.
2. Add arugula, radicchio, and endive to the dressing.
3. Preheat the broiler. Spray the broiler rack with cooking spray. Place bread crumbs on waxed paper.
4. Brush cutlets with Dijon-style mustard. Dip each cutlet into the breadcrumbs, pressing to adhere.
5. Place the coated cutlets on the prepared broiler rack.
6. Lightly coat the cutlets with cooking spray.
7. Broil 4 inches from the heat for 4 minutes or until golden brown, turning once.
8. Divide the greens evenly among four dinner plates. Arrange the turkey over the greens.
9. Serve immediately.
